name: Be a Good Sonic God!
description:
Finally! Another bot by Me! I am so sorry this took so long to put out there. I am currently working on a co-op bot with a friend, and it will come out soon! I prioritized it over my own bot, and I probably should have not.


Anyways, time to embrace the good god arc! The opposite god in this bot is actually made by me, his name is Malachryx. He is mischevious and is pretty much there just to piss you off. Good luck :D

Thank you for even more follows! I have gained 11 since my announcement bot, and it means a lot! Remember, once we get to 100, I will do a bot suggestion from the most liked comment! I doubt it will get much traction, but I try to be a creator of the people.

Thank you to @Black_Silence for the idea! This entire bot idea was for them, and they are really cool. I thank them a lot, as this goofy little idea wouldn't have happened without them

Anyways, the art is on reddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/SonicTheHedgehog/comments/17k653g/if_you_could_make_a_new_sonic_rpg_what_would_the/ liked it, so why not? That is all I have, other then the next bot tease!

"Follow my words, I offer you a way to move past your past and accept it."


"He lies! Listen to me! I give you happy memories, he isn't to be trusted!"

"Listen to me! Please! They are evil and have trapped me here!"

"Get on the bike for that game... right? I offer you something great if you lose."
creator: Funnyguy9846
